name: codex-impl-plan-completion-loop
title: codex-impl-plan-completion-loop
description: Find incomplete implementation plans under impl-plans/active, delegate each selected plan to codex-design-and-implement-review-loop, and repeat sequentially until no incomplete active plans remain.
